title: fix: add BPAI_PASSWORD for klein 4B to avoid 429s
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Unlocking the Klein model
gist.blurb: We've smoothed out the rate limits for the Klein 4B image model. Your generations should now flow freely without hitting those pesky 429 errors.
gist.summary: Added the required authentication secrets for the bpaigen provider to resolve rate limiting issues with the Klein 4B model.
gist.impact: Users generating images with the `klein` model will no longer experience 429 Too Many Requests errors, resulting in reliable generations.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about fixing rate limits and unlocking a model using a password/secret. Visual metaphors: a key, unlocking a terminal, smooth flow. The bee mascot using a glowing key to unlock a retro terminal while the monitor robot looks happy.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a glowing lime green (#ecf874) pixelated key, unlocking a retro computer terminal. The chunky monitor robot stands nearby looking relieved and happy, with a beautiful generated landscape on its screen. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
